title: Add error handling to file write operations (app.py:325, agent_config.py:279,291)

requirements: Add error handling to 4 file write operations: app.py:325, agent_config.py:279, agent_config.py:291, agent_config.py:1226
Wrap write operations in try-except blocks catching OSError, IOError, PermissionError
Return error response to client on write failure (JSONResponse with success:false)
Add atomic write pattern for critical .env writes (temp file + atomic rename)
Add logging for all write failures with file path and error details
acceptance: 8 test cases pass: verify by pytest novel_agent/tests/test_app_settings.py -v
4 write operations wrapped in try-except: verify by rg 'try:.*write_text' novel_agent/web/app.py
Error responses return JSON: verify by rg 'JSONResponse.*success.*false' novel_agent/web/app.py

shared_context.pattern: try-except OSError with JSONResponse error return
conventions: Return JSONResponse with success:false on error

pre_analysis.action: Load context package for file write locations
Find all file write operations without error handling

implementation_approach.title: Red Phase - Write failing tests for file write error handling
implementation_approach.description: Write 8 test cases that verify error handling when file writes fail
modification_points: Create 1 test file: novel_agent/tests/test_app_settings.py with 8 test cases
Test 1-5: Various error scenarios (permission denied, disk full, write failures, atomic write cleanup, multi-file errors)
logic_flow: Write 8 test cases mocking write failures and verifying error responses
Run pytest to verify all 8 tests fail (no error handling yet)
implementation_approach.output: 8 failing test cases for write error handling

implementation_approach.title: Green Phase - Implement error handling for file write operations
implementation_approach.description: Wrap all file write operations in try-except blocks with error responses
modification_points: Modify 4 write operations: app.py:325, agent_config.py:279, agent_config.py:291, agent_config.py:1226
Add try-except blocks catching (OSError, IOError, PermissionError)
Return JSONResponse({'success': False, 'error': str(e)}) on failure
Add atomic write pattern for .env: write to temp file, then atomic rename
Add logging.error() calls with file path and exception details
logic_flow: Wrap env_file.write_text(new_settings) in try-except (OSError, IOError, PermissionError)
Add logging.error(f'Failed to write .env file: {e}') in except block
Return JSONResponse({'success': False, 'error': f'Failed to save settings: {e}'}, status_code=500)
Implement atomic write: write to temp file .env.tmp, then Path.rename() if write succeeds
Run pytest to verify all 8 tests pass
implementation_approach.output: Error handling for all file write operations

implementation_approach.title: Refactor Phase - Extract error handling pattern and improve atomic writes
implementation_approach.description: Refactor to reduce code duplication and improve atomic write reliability
modification_points: Extract 1 helper function: safe_file_write(file_path, content) in app.py or utils
Improve 1 atomic write pattern: add cleanup for stale temp files
Verify consistent error response format across all endpoints
logic_flow: Extract safe_file_write helper function accepting file_path, content, and error_context
Update all 4 write locations to use safe_file_write helper
Improve atomic write: check for stale .env.tmp files, cleanup before write
Run pytest novel_agent/tests/ -v to ensure no regressions
implementation_approach.output: Refactored error handling with helper functions
